name: Rampas Cintaku
overview: This drama tells the story of a young man named Rizal, who is intelligent but faces many challenges and hardships in life. He and his younger brother were raised by his aunt, Mak Ngah Ila who did not love them. The situation worsened when Mak Ngah Ila was in debt to 'ah long' which disturbed their family. For this reason, Rizal chose the easy way to go to Kuala Lumpur and work in a night club. There, he meets Datin Safieya, a rich businessman who has a dark history with his household.
